大发计算大小单双和值技巧规律【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238163252_61253409<br>vk.com/topic-238394666_61005837<br>vk.com/topic-237864373_60909886<br>vk.com/topic-238581034_60669049<br>vk.com/topic-238264836_61005850<br>vk.com/topic-238581371_62285145<br>vk.com/topic-238118276_61005834<br>vk.com/topic-238135101_62285156<br>vk.com/topic-238539362_61253434<br>vk.com/topic-238539930_61761816<br>vk.com/topic-238581368_61141029<br>vk.com/topic-238309426_61005878<br>vk.com/topic-238581367_62100598<br>vk.com/topic-238539764_60669084<br>vk.com/topic-238163212_61253445<br>vk.com/topic-238135597_62100607<br>vk.com/topic-238163206_61005898<br>vk.com/topic-238543369_61441465<br>vk.com/topic-238580093_60909965<br>vk.com/topic-238118188_61141077<br>vk.com/topic-238581014_60669132<br>vk.com/topic-238552411_62285205<br>vk.com/topic-238581372_61253477<br>vk.com/topic-238581373_60910025<br>vk.com/topic-238581199_61441505<br>vk.com/topic-238581078_61141096<br>vk.com/topic-238539186_61005954<br>vk.com/topic-238530773_60910042<br>vk.com/topic-238570067_62100688<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60669185<br>vk.com/topic-238581212_61253520<br>vk.com/topic-238394877_62100703<br>vk.com/topic-238522435_60559798<br>vk.co
